title: `reg` does not delay for a cycle

features.name: clock_gate_enable_from_register_chain
features.description: Code should include a clock gate module where the gated clock enable is derived from an OR of registers that are themselves clocked by the gated clock output

features.name: multi_stage_pipeline_gated_clock
features.description: Code should include a multi-stage pipeline where registers are clocked by a gated clock and one stage's output directly affects the gate enable
